mca_friend.title: Build a relationship with an MCA Reborn villager — reach Friend or higher status

bounty_board.title: Place a Bountiful Bounty Board and complete one bounty decree

antique_atlas.title: Mark your settlement on an Antique Atlas

subtitle.text: A kingdom without people is a ruin with good walls. You need the people.

description: Ch12 is not only about the eyes in the portal.
It is about what you are building while you wait.
MCA Reborn transforms villagers into people — with names, relationships, jobs.
They have opinions. They remember you. Treat them accordingly.
Rose gold is the gift currency. The higher the status, the better the trades.
Bountiful adds bounty boards with formal decree contracts.
Post a board near your settlement center.
Complete a decree — this establishes the kingdom's administrative function.
Antique Atlas records the world as you explore it.
Mark your base. It is the center now.
Everything else is distance from it.
→ Build a friendship with an MCA villager [check]
→ Set up a Bounty Board and complete a decree [check]
→ Mark your settlement on the atlas [check]
